title: aegilops mutica f. puluci
intro: Aegilops mutica f. puluci, also known as Aegilops cylindrica, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops mutica f. puluci include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
